name: uncertain ownership lands as a question-assertion, not an owned fact
description: 'Not sure if the cordless drill is mine or Devon's' is ambiguous ownership. Modeled the spec-correct way: a single low-confidence owns fact carrying assertion=question (docs/ANALYSIS.md 'Assertion status': the wiki demotes everything below asserted; a question is not an owned fact). parse_extraction keeps question in ASSERTIONS, the pipeline inserts it as-is, and because it is the only fact on Me.owns.Drill it stays active with assertion=question -- the wiki must NOT render it as an asserted possession. Raj is the rival claimant entity (the note's 'Devon'); his potential ownership is left to a human via the low confidence rather than auto-asserted. Pins that the harness preserves the question assertion (the disambiguation seam), distinct from the H2 low-confidence health guard.

steps.body: Not sure if the cordless drill is mine or Raj's.

facts.statement: The cordless drill may be mine.
